subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath shone forth and gleamed, Who hath appeared and proclaimed, Who hath ordained and granted, Who hath bestowed and permitted unto every luminous essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن اشرق و لاح و ظهر و باح و قدر و اتاح و سمح و اباح لکل کینونه نورانیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
